calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Timothy Andre West was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Timothy Andre Millet.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Reset To Oct-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Bruce Chan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Timothy Andre West, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After the Court inquired of the Petitioner's status on the out standing Warrants, matter is continued to Oct. 7, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for proofs of Warrants were discharged.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Off Calendar
